Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Sep-25-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Justin Swidler (jswidler@swartz-legal.com) and Alex Straus (alex@whitfieldbryson.com) for Plaintiff.
Anthony Ly (310.553.0308; ALy@littler.com) for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs HAROLD BROWER, SARMAD MATTI's Motion For Reconsideration:

Plaintiff Sarmad Matti's motion for reconsideration is denied. I continue to adopt the analyses and conclusions of the federal courts in our jurisdiction, as stated in my order compelling arbitration. To eliminate any doubt that this litigation is stayed pending the arbitration, it is so ordered.

order signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
